name: coTfsLssAnswerSdoNmtRequests
title: coTfsLssAnswerSdoNmtRequests
syntax: long coTfsLssAnswerSdoNmtRequests( dword nodeId, dword vendorId, dword productCode, dword revisionNo, dword serialNo );
description: This function is a support function for the LSS FastScan Master test and answers certain SDO and NMT requests.

parameters.name: nodeId
parameters.description: Node-ID of the device under test (DUT).
